text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Twas a good day, good day! Today's a great day! Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser strolls into my office just before the day's
training session, a satisfied smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Right you are! I've got rainbow octopi, scallop strips, and even
tokoroten—the honorable seaweed jelly and eighth of the Seven
Gods of Fortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! ♪ I mean that I enjoyed them all! The octopi, scallops, and the
eighth of the Seven Gods of Fortune, you know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still unsure of exactly what she is saying, I press her for more
information.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Let's start at the beginning. Twin Turbo was telling me all about these
rainbow-colored octopus gummies she likes, so I went to the store
with her!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: We procured the multicolored mollusks, and whaddya know!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
On the package it says that only the luckiest will find an ultra-rare
crab gummy hiding in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
We ommed and nommed on those opulent octos until we turned up
two crabs! One for each of us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
After that, I went to buy some scallop strips with Nature at the nearby
shopping street. They really hit the spot during our tea time!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
One of the nice ladies who works there was kind enough to brew us
some tea that went perfectly with our fishy snacks.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I need to start calling her Super-Nice Nature or something, because she let me have the last one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Chewing on just one of those scallop strips gives you enough time to
really ponder life's most pressing questions...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And finally just before, I went to do some fortune hunting with
Fukukitaru! We crossed vast fields and crested great mountains, and
finally...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
An immense discovery! Who knew that tokoroten was right up there
after Daikoku-ten and Ebisu-ten as the eighth of the Seven Gods of
Fortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Fukukitaru did say that only we were privy to this info so far, so do try to keep this a secret for now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But what a blessing! We had little choice but to devour the most holy
of jellies—prayerfully, of course.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You know, I'm really lucky to have such nice friends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but wonder how she's still ready to get right into training
after such a busy day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Any normal person would be absolutely exhausted after all of that.
choice_data_list: Are you okay for training? Aren't you tired?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Not at all! I didn't even leave the neighborhood! Still full of
energy over here. See? Could a tired person do this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her little jig is much more convincing than I care to admit. In fact, she somehow looks even more energetic than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I may need to stop letting things like this surprise me so much.
choice_data_list: You might be the liveliest person I know.
You might be the liveliest person I know.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Really? I think I'm pretty normal, but hearing that does make me feel
a little special, ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh hey, want some octopi? I've still got plenty!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wait a sec, where'd they get off to? Hey, come on out, octo buds!
Oooctopi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gwah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tumble tumble

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Bwa haaaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tannhauser has an unfortunate run-in with a table, and the octopi
gummies that were resting upon it are now scattered on the floor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she stands up, it is plain to see by her nosebleed that the table
had the upper hand in this bout.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ouchie ouchie, ob gourse dis would happen. Sniff.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeb, neber been better! Dis happens all da time. Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ah, but look at all ma poor octo buds! Sorry, I'll come sabe you now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And this was supposed to be her lucky day, too. Still, I'm glad that I
can be there for her, in more ways than one.
